Freedom_Phalanx_Reserve.summary: Earn a reserve membership into Paragon City's premier hero group.

badge_chain.tracks: Exploration badge in Boomtown
Exploration badge in Echo: Galaxy City
Exploration badge in Independence Port
Exploration badge in Kings Row
Exploration badge in Kings Row
Exploration badge in Skyway City
Exploration badge in Steel Canyon
Visit 5 history plaques: Talos Island, Independence Port (x2), Echo: Dark Astoria, Terra Volta
Defeat 100 Freakshow Tanks
Defeat 100 Clockwork Gears that spawn after a Clockwork Prince is defeated
Defeat 100 Fake Nemesis

Freedom_Phalanx_Reserve.note: Hero/vigilante only. The villain equivalent is the High Pain Threshold badge.

Long_Range_Teleport.text: Obtain this accolade by collecting ten Exploration badges. Earning this accolade grants you the Long Range Teleporter power.

Marshall.text: Obtain this badge by earning the following badges: Fire Marshal, Bomb Squad, PPD Deputy, Security Expert, Interceptor and Villain Disruptor.

Portal_Jockey.summary: Help Portal Corporation explore the multiverse.

badge_chain.tracks: Exploration badge in a Tina Macintyre mission
Exploration badge in a Maria Jenkins mission
Visit 3 history plaques: Founders' Falls, Brickstown (x2)
Defeat the Praetorian Earth arch-villains (Anti-Matter, Battle Maiden, Black Swan, Bobcat, Chimera, Diabolique, Dominatrix and the rest)

Portal_Jockey.note: Hero/vigilante only. Villains and rogues can earn credit, but the badge is awarded on changing alignment.

Task_Force_Commander.summary: Complete each of the Task Forces given out by the Freedom Phalanx.

badge_chain.tracks: Complete both parts of Positron's Task Force, The Rule of Three
Complete Synapse's Task Force, The Fall of the Clockwork King
Complete Penelope Yin's Task Force, A Clamor for the People
Complete Citadel's Task Force, Citadel's Children
Complete Manticore's Task Force, Following Countess Crey
Complete Numina's Task Force, Soul of the Woodsman

Task_Force_Commander.note: Hero/vigilante only. Villains and rogues can earn credit, but the badge is awarded on changing alignment.

The_Atlas_Medallion.summary: Earn the might of Atlas, one of the greatest heroes of Paragon City's history.

badge_chain.tracks: Exploration badge in Atlas Park
Visit 5 history plaques: Atlas Park, Echo: Galaxy City, Kings Row (x2), Perez Park
Finish the Rescue Fortune Teller mission (from Dr. Trevor Seaborn, Hugo Redding, Haley Philips, or via Flashback)
Defeat 200 Council War Wolves
Defeat 200 Council Vampyri

The_Atlas_Medallion.note: Hero/vigilante only. The villain equivalent is the Marshal badge.
